topic: Michael Olise Assist Watch vs Morocco

current.headline: Will Ismael Saibari be fit for Morocco's World Cup quarter-final against France?
current.summary: New Bayern Munich signing Ismael Saibari remains a doubt due to a muscle injury as Morocco prepare for their World Cup quarter-final clash with France.

items.headline: Morocco set a proud example for Africa as France await at World Cup
items.summary: The 2022 semi-finalists have delighted fans at home as the continent's other sides struggle with off-field problems Over the past six decades, Morocco have achieved several performance milestones for Africa at the Wor...
